changes.description: Replaced full 432-line verbose skill with focused 85-line version. Removed generic git reference content (setup, remote ops, stashing, rebasing, submodules, clean, aliases, tips, common issues, workflows). Added task-relevant sections: history analysis commands (rev-list, shortlog, merge counting, file tracking with --no-merges), branch creation from tags, cherry-picking by message search, lightweight tagging, and JSON report writing pattern with correct type handling. Added critical notes about cd-ing into repo dir and writing output to working directory not repo.
